title: Personal user - no tenant data in the mobile app
scenario: Guest user sees "None" and "Unknown" values for Tenant/User fields in Poly Studio Mobile app Support screen
steps: Log in as Guest (personal user, no tenant)
Observe the Tenant name, Tenant ID, and User ID fields
Re-observe the Tenant name, Tenant ID, User ID, and Last connected fields
expected: For a personal user (no tenant), the Tenant name, Tenant ID, and User ID fields should display appropriate values (e.g., user-specific info or "N/A") and the Last connected field should show a valid timestamp or "N/A". Tapping "Later" should dismiss the view or update the fields correctly.
